Name: Average time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants where both activities occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after SW-AE Assign Reviewers in the same case
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average duration of SW-AE Assign Reviewers when followed by SW-Reviewer Declined compared to when followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined occurs

Name: Time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer No Response in cases where no reviewer ultimately agrees
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and the subsequent occurrence of Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Total time spent in SW-AE Assign Reviewers activity across all revision rounds (SW, RW, RSW) grouped by manuscript outcome (e.g., Accept, Major Revision, Reject)
Metric: the sum of the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' or `ACTIVITY` == 'RW-AE Assign Reviewers' or `ACTIVITY` == 'RSW-AE Assign Reviewers' and the last time instant when <ppinot4py.model.states.RuntimeState object at 0x724e89cb7610> - AppliesTo.PROCESS grouped by the last value of code

Name: Minimum time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-Reviewer Unavailable in cases involving reviewer unavailability
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to the next occurrence of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in the same case, indicating reassignment cycles
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Average time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants that include an AE recommendation step
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and Plagiarism Originality Report Completed in variants where plagiarism checking precedes reviewer assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-EIC Accept in successful submission paths
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Time it takes SW-AE Assign Reviewers to be completed after SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in the initial review phase
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Average time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that reach a final editorial decision
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'", 'aggregation': 'average', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-EIC Accept' or activity == 'SW-EIC Reject' or activity == 'SW-EIC Major Revision' or activity == 'SW-EIC Minor Revision' or activity == 'SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit'"}"

Name: Minimum time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit in rejected-with-resubmission cases
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit'", 'aggregation': 'minimum'}"
